description: Composition Dark grey slim Fit trousers made of polyester and rayon blend fabric, that has pin stripes, flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, plastic zipper, button and hook closure and loops on the waist to secure a belt Fitting Slim fit, straight leg Wash care Machine wash cold in 30 degree water Wash dark colours separately using mild detergent Avoid soaking, remove promptly Do not bleach Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron on prints or embellishments Upgrade your sophisticated style with these dark grey pin striped trousers from genesis. The polyester and rayon blend fabric gives a great fit, while the classic cut of the trousers makes it perfect for formal wear. Team these with shirts and leather oxfords for a well groomed look. Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 44" Height-6.3”, Waist – 32”
